assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud command with --maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA" and Saturday 2:00 AM timing

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Includes complete gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence parameters

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Shows four quarterly exclusions with example dates, each around 15-17 days duration

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Includes specific exclusion 'Q4-freeze-audit-2024' covering November 1 - December 15

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or how to handle longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Shows manual upgrade command under 'Emergency Override Process' section with note that it bypasses maintenance window

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Suggests using stable channel for production and mentions Extended channel (24 months) for critical systems

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Shows complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time for multiple exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Does not explicitly warn about version drift risks during extended exclusion periods
